meta.title: Initiative ... A Key In Cyber Persistence Theory
meta.description: Michael Fischerkeller explains the importance of a nation having the "initiative" in the cyber realm as part of the Cyber Persistence Theory in this clip from our S4x23 interview. #s4xevents
